title: Hearty British Lentil Stew
description: A rich and comforting stew made with lentils and a variety of vegetables. Perfect for a chilly evening.
instructions: In a large pot, heat 2 tbsp of oil over medium heat.
Add the onion and garlic and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the carrots and potatoes and cook for another 5 minutes.
Add the mushrooms and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown.
Add the lentils, vegetable broth, water, salt, and pepper.
Bring to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 30 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
